channel.title: 璃柏涟の筆記
channel.subtitle: 专注学习筆記
channel.description: 喜欢的东西就努力去追求，万一成功了呢！

item.title: python qt5 实现记事本界面
item.description: <h2 id="用qt5实现一个简单的记事本界面"><a class="markdownIt-Anchor" href="#用qt5实现一个简单的记事本界面">#</a> 用 qt5 实现一个简单的记事本界面</h2> <figure class="highlight python"><figcaption data-lang="python"></figcaption><table><tr class="marked"><td data-num="1"></td><td><pre><span class="token keyword">import</span> sys</pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="2"></td><td><pre></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="3"></td><td><pre><span class="token keyword">from</span> PyQt5<span class="token punctuation">.</span>QtGui <span class="token keyword">import</span> QCursor<span class="token punctuation">,</span> QIcon</pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="4"></td><td><pre><span class="token keyword">from</span> PyQt5<span class="token punctuation">.</span>QtWidgets <span class="token keyword">import</span> QApplication<span class="token punctuation">,</span> QMenu<span class="token punctuation">,</span> QMainWindow<span class="token punctuation">,</span> QAction</pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="5"></td><td><pre></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="6"></td><td><pre></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="7"></td><td><pre><span class="token keyword">class</span> <span class="token class-name">menu</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>QMainWindow<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="8"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment"># 初始化面板大小</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="9"></td><td><pre> <span class="token keyword">def</span> <span class="token function">__init__</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>self<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="10"></td><td><pre> <span class="token builtin">super</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>menu<span class="token punctuation">,</span> self<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span>__init__<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="11"></td><td><pre> self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>title <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token string">'notepad--'</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="12"></td><td><pre> self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>left <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token number">500</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="13"></td><td><pre> self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>top <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token number">1000</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="14"></td><td><pre> self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>width <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token number">600</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="15"></td><td><pre> self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>height <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token number">600</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="16"></td><td><pre> self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>initUI<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="17"></td><td><pre></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="18"></td><td><pre></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="19"></td><td><pre> <span class="token keyword">def</span> <span class="token function">initUI</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>self<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="20"></td><td><pre> self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>setWindowTitle<span class="token punctuation">(</span>self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>title<span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="21"></td><td><pre> self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>setGeometry<span class="token punctuation">(</span>self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>top<span class="token punctuation">,</span> self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>left<span class="token punctuation">,</span> self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>width<span class="token punctuation">,</span> self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>height<span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="22"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment"># 实例化菜单条</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="23"></td><td><pre> mainMenubar <span class="token operator">=</span> self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>menuBar<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="24"></td><td><pre> </pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="25"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment"># 将 menuitems 添加到 menubar 并命名</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="26"></td><td><pre> menu_item_name <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'fileMenu'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'editMenu'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'formatMenu'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'searchMenu'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'helpMenu'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="27"></td><td><pre> menu_item_bar_name <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'文件'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'编辑'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'格式'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'查看'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'帮助'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="28"></td><td><pre> <span class="token keyword">for</span> l <span class="token keyword">in</span> <span class="token builtin">range</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token builtin">len</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>menu_item_name<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="29"></td><td><pre> menu_item_name<span class="token punctuation">[</span>l<span class="token punctuation">]</span> <span class="token operator">=</span> mainMenubar<span class="token punctuation">.</span>addMenu<span class="token punctuation">(</span>menu_item_bar_name<span class="token punctuation">[</span>l<span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="30"></td><td><pre></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="31"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment"># 将操作名、属性名、快捷键用列表封装起来，用循环进行添加，此处有不足之处就是循环不能合一，后续有能力再优化一下</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="32"></td><td><pre> file_name <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'新建(N)'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'打开(O)'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'保存(S)'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'另存为(A)'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'页面设置(U)'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'打印(P)'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'退出(X)'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="33"></td><td><pre> file_name_as <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'new'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'open'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'save'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'save_as'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'setup'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'print'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'exit'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="34"></td><td><pre> file_shortcut_key <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'Ctrl+N'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'Ctrl+O'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'Ctrl+S'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">''</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">''</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'Ctrl+P'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">''</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="35"></td><td><pre></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="36"></td><td><pre> edit_name <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'撤销(U)'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'剪切(T)'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'复制(C)'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'粘贴(V)'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'删除(L)'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'查找(F)'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'查找下一个(N)'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'替换(R)'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'转到(G)'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'全选(A)'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="37"></td><td><pre> <span class="token string">'时间/日期(D)'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="38"></td><td><pre> edit_name_as <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'repeal'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'cut'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'copy'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'paste'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'dele'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'search'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'search_one'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'replace'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'goto'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="39"></td><td><pre> <span class="token string">'check_all'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'datetimes'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="40"></td><td><pre> edit_shortcut_key <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'Ctrl+Z'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'Ctrl+X'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'Ctrl+C'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'Ctrl+V'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'Del'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'Ctrl+F'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'F3'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'Ctrl+H'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'Ctrl+G'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="41"></td><td><pre> <span class="token string">'Ctrl+A'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'F5'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="42"></td><td><pre></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="43"></td><td><pre> format_name <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'自动换行(W)'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'字体(F)'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="44"></td><td><pre> format_name_as <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'lines'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'font'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="45"></td><td><pre> format_shortcut_key <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">''</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">''</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="46"></td><td><pre></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="47"></td><td><pre> search_name <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'状态栏(S)'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="48"></td><td><pre> search_name_as <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'statusbar'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="49"></td><td><pre> search_shortcut_key <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">''</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="50"></td><td><pre></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="51"></td><td><pre> help_name <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'查看帮助(H)'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'关于记事本(A)'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="52"></td><td><pre> help_name_as <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'lookhelp'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'about'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="53"></td><td><pre> help_shortcut_key <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">''</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">''</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="54"></td><td><pre></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="55"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment"># 用循环将子菜单添加到菜单</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="56"></td><td><pre> <span class="token keyword">for</span> i <span class="token keyword">in</span> <span class="token builtin">range</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token builtin">len</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>file_name_as<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="57"></td><td><pre> file_name_as<span class="token punctuation">[</span>i<span class="token punctuation">]</span> <span class="token operator">=</span> QAction<span class="token punctuation">(</span>QIcon<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">'12.png'</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> file_name_as<span class="token punctuation">[</span>i<span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> self<span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="58"></td><td><pre> file_name_as<span class="token punctuation">[</span>i<span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span>setShortcut<span class="token punctuation">(</span>file_shortcut_key<span class="token punctuation">[</span>i<span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="59"></td><td><pre> file_name_as<span class="token punctuation">[</span>i<span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span>setText<span class="token punctuation">(</span>file_name<span class="token punctuation">[</span>i<span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="60"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment"># 将子菜单添加到菜单</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="61"></td><td><pre> menu_item_name<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token number">0</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span>addAction<span class="token punctuation">(</span>file_name_as<span class="token punctuation">[</span>i<span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="62"></td><td><pre></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="63"></td><td><pre> <span class="token keyword">for</span> i <span class="token keyword">in</span> <span class="token builtin">range</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token builtin">len</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>edit_name_as<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="64"></td><td><pre> edit_name_as<span class="token punctuation">[</span>i<span class="token punctuation">]</span> <span class="token operator">=</span> QAction<span class="token punctuation">(</span>QIcon<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">'12.png'</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> edit_name_as<span class="token punctuation">[</span>i<span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> self<span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="65"></td><td><pre> edit_name_as<span class="token punctuation">[</span>i<span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span>setShortcut<span class="token punctuation">(</span>edit_shortcut_key<span class="token punctuation">[</span>i<span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="66"></td><td><pre> edit_name_as<span class="token punctuation">[</span>i<span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span>setText<span class="token punctuation">(</span>edit_name<span class="token punctuation">[</span>i<span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="67"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment"># 将子菜单添加到菜单</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="68"></td><td><pre> menu_item_name<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token number">1</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span>addAction<span class="token punctuation">(</span>edit_name_as<span class="token punctuation">[</span>i<span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="69"></td><td><pre></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="70"></td><td><pre> <span class="token keyword">for</span> i <span class="token keyword">in</span> <span class="token builtin">range</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token builtin">len</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>format_name_as<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="71"></td><td><pre> format_name_as<span class="token punctuation">[</span>i<span class="token punctuation">]</span> <span class="token operator">=</span> QAction<span class="token punctuation">(</span>QIcon<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">'12.png'</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> format_name_as<span class="token punctuation">[</span>i<span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> self<span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="72"></td><td><pre> format_name_as<span class="token punctuation">[</span>i<span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span>setShortcut<span class="token punctuation">(</span>format_shortcut_key<span class="token punctuation">[</span>i<span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="73"></td><td><pre> format_name_as<span class="token punctuation">[</span>i<span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span>setText<span class="token punctuation">(</span>format_name<span class="token punctuation">[</span>i<span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="74"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment"># 将子菜单添加到菜单</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="75"></td><td><pre> menu_item_name<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token number">2</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span>addAction<span class="token punctuation">(</span>format_name_as<span class="token punctuation">[</span>i<span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="76"></td><td><pre></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="77"></td><td><pre> <span class="token keyword">for</span> i <span class="token keyword">in</span> <span class="token builtin">range</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token builtin">len</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>search_name_as<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="78"></td><td><pre> search_name_as<span class="token punctuation">[</span>i<span class="token punctuation">]</span> <span class="token operator">=</span> QAction<span class="token punctuation">(</span>QIcon<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">'12.png'</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> search_name_as<span class="token punctuation">[</span>i<span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> self<span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="79"></td><td><pre> search_name_as<span class="token punctuation">[</span>i<span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span>setShortcut<span class="token punctuation">(</span>search_shortcut_key<span class="token punctuation">[</span>i<span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="80"></td><td><pre> search_name_as<span class="token punctuation">[</span>i<span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span>setText<span class="token punctuation">(</span>search_name<span class="token punctuation">[</span>i<span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="81"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment"># 将子菜单添加到菜单</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="82"></td><td><pre> menu_item_name<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token number">3</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span>addAction<span class="token punctuation">(</span>search_name_as<span class="token punctuation">[</span>i<span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="83"></td><td><pre></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="84"></td><td><pre> <span class="token keyword">for</span> i <span class="token keyword">in</span> <span class="token builtin">range</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token builtin">len</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>help_name_as<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="85"></td><td><pre> help_name_as<span class="token punctuation">[</span>i<span class="token punctuation">]</span> <span class="token operator">=</span> QAction<span class="token punctuation">(</span>QIcon<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">'12.png'</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> help_name_as<span class="token punctuation">[</span>i<span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> self<span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="86"></td><td><pre> help_name_as<span class="token punctuation">[</span>i<span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span>setShortcut<span class="token punctuation">(</span>help_shortcut_key<span class="token punctuation">[</span>i<span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="87"></td><td><pre> help_name_as<span class="token punctuation">[</span>i<span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span>setText<span class="token punctuation">(</span>help_name<span class="token punctuation">[</span>i<span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="88"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment"># 将子菜单添加到菜单</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="89"></td><td><pre> menu_item_name<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token number">4</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span>addAction<span class="token punctuation">(</span>help_name_as<span class="token punctuation">[</span>i<span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="90"></td><td><pre></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="91"></td><td><pre> self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>show<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="92"></td><td><pre></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="93"></td><td><pre></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="94"></td><td><pre><span class="token keyword">if</span> __name__ <span class="token operator">==</span> <span class="token string">'__main__'</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="95"></td><td><pre> app <span class="token operator">=</span> QApplication<span class="token punctuation">(</span>sys<span class="token punctuation">.</span>argv<span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="96"></td><td><pre> s <span class="token operator">=</span> menu<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="97"></td><td><pre> sys<span class="token punctuation">.</span>exit<span class="token punctuation">(</span>app<span class="token punctuation">.</span>exec_<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr></table></figure><p><strong>预览图</strong></p> <p><img data-src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/0000rookie/imgs/Hexoimgs/2022044946.jpeg" alt=""></p>

item.title: ERROR: spyder 4.0.1 requires pyqtwebengine<5.13; python_version >= 3, which is not installed. ERROR: spyder 4.0.1 has requirement pyqt5<5.13; python_version >= 3, but you'll have pyqt5 5.15.6 which is incompatible.
root破解手机限速问题
python-math库
python基础
CentOS新增root用户
日记分享2022.4.13
如何在hexo博客写作
jsdelivr刷新缓存
记录自用hexo模块
Linux忘记数据库密码
QQ/微信/支付宝 收款码美化
如何给PicGo添加水印
常用命令指令
item.description: <figure class="highlight bash"><figcaption data-lang="bash"></figcaption><table><tr class="marked"><td data-num="1"></td><td><pre>tree <span class="token builtin class-name">.</span> <span class="token comment">#列出当前文件夹下的所有文件</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="2"></td><td><pre>tree /f <span class="token comment">#显示当前文件夹所有文件</span></pre></td></tr><tr class="marked"><td data-num="3"></td><td><pre>tree /a <span class="token comment">#显示当前文件夹的所有文件夹</span></pre></td></tr></table></figure>

item.title: 4.9日记分享
item.description: <h2 id="49日记分享"><a class="markdownIt-Anchor" href="#49日记分享">#</a> 4.9 日记分享</h2> <p>自从开始玩博客之后，经常用到 <code>Git</code> ，感觉非常重要。如今每个企业都基本用到 <code>Git</code> ，如果就业的时候不会使用 <code>Git</code> ，感觉还是落后于别人一步的，而且，现在也有时间学习，倒不如现在开始学习一下，顺便玩一玩服务器，可能对 <code>Git</code> 会更加熟练，话不多说，直接动手开始学习。</p>

item.title: hexo结构分析
item.description: <h2 id="meta头文件"><a class="markdownIt-Anchor" href="#meta头文件">#</a> <code>meta</code> 头文件</h2> <figure class="highlight html"><figcaption data-lang="HTML"></figcaption><table><tr><td data-num="1"></td><td><pre># 存放mate头文件</pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="2"></td><td><pre>.\themes\shoka\layout\_partials\head</pre></td></tr></table></figure>

item.title: git push origin master失败
这是大二下的各科作业
为博客添加免费的CDN加速
